name: gandhi-monorepo
author: Matthieu FREITAG
description: Monorepo for the Gandhi Discord bot and its web service, sharing a common domain core

scripts.build: npm run build:core && npm run build:bot && npm run build:web
scripts.start: npm run build:core && npm run build:bot && node --enable-source-maps apps/bot/dist/src/index.js
scripts.start:web: npm run build:core && npm run build:web && node --enable-source-maps apps/web-api/dist/index.js
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace gandhi-discord-bot && npm run lint --workspace @gandhi/web-api
scripts.commands:view: npm run build && node --enable-source-maps apps/bot/dist/src/index.js commands view
scripts.commands:register: npm run build && node --enable-source-maps apps/bot/dist/src/index.js commands register
scripts.commands:rename: npm run build && node --enable-source-maps apps/bot/dist/src/index.js commands rename
scripts.commands:delete: npm run build && node --enable-source-maps apps/bot/dist/src/index.js commands delete
scripts.commands:clear: npm run build && node --enable-source-maps apps/bot/dist/src/index.js commands clear
